title: The Many Shapley Values for Model Explanation
abstract_nl: We identify two reasons for the multiplicity of Shapley values. First, whether training data plays a role. Second, how the value function references the model.
key_contributions: Many Shapley Values: 多种 v(S) 给出不同归因
Sparsity of training data obscures properties of model
Unused feature may still accrue importance (在某些 v(S) 下)

process_meta.[AH-HA]: SY19 是 SC 启蒙 —— '既然有多种 Shapley, 我们要新 axiom 选'
